description_long: This apartment building is a modern, mid-rise structure with five stories, featuring a clean, geometric facade. The front side displays large, vertically aligned windows and a recessed entrance area, while the left side is accented by a series of balconies with glass or metal railings and potted plants. The rear of the building is more austere, with smaller, regularly spaced windows and minimal ornamentation. The right side features a central vertical shaft, likely housing a stairwell, with windows that follow the stair's ascent. The building sits on a slightly raised platform with a driveway or parking area in front, and landscaped green strips on the sides. The overall color palette is neutral, with shades of white, gray, and beige, and the materials suggest reinforced concrete, glass, and metal.
description: A modern five-story apartment building with large windows, balconies, and a neutral color palette, featuring a prominent stairwell and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a partial view of balconies on the left.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the series of balconies, stairwell windows, and the building's layered facade.
description_view_2: Rear view with smaller, evenly spaced windows and a simple, unadorned facade.
description_view_3: Right-side view dominated by the central stairwell shaft and a row of windows, with minimal decorative features.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns, with regular spacing and alignment across all floors, and grouped in sets on the stairwell side.
